general.late_checkout_policy: Late checkout subject to availability, RM50/hour fee applies. Please request by 10am on checkout day.
general.early_checkin_policy: Early check-in from 12pm subject to availability, RM50 fee applies.
general.noise_policy: Quiet hours from 11pm to 8am. Please be considerate of neighbours.
general.visitor_policy: Registered guests only. No unregistered overnight visitors.
general.suite_directory: Luxe Family Suite = building:tower_a unit:3-05 | City View Studio = building:tower_a unit:18-02 | Pool View Suite = building:tower_b unit:5-01 | Skyline Studio = building:tower_b unit:22-08

tower_a.name: Tower A
tower_a.lift_access: Use the left bank lifts for floors 2-20. Tap your access card on the reader.

3-05.description: Spacious 3-bedroom suite on floor 3, perfect for large families or groups of up to 8. Features a fully equipped kitchen, separate living and dining area, and a private balcony.

18-02.description: Cosy studio on floor 18 with sweeping city views. Ideal for solo travellers or couples. Features a king bed, kitchenette, and floor-to-ceiling windows.

tower_b.name: Tower B
tower_b.lift_access: All lifts serve all floors. Present your keycard to the security desk on arrival.

5-01.description: Bright 2-bedroom suite on floor 5 with direct views of Tower B's rooftop infinity pool. Comfortably sleeps up to 5. Features a master bedroom, second bedroom with twin beds, and a balcony.

22-08.description: Stylish studio on the high floor 22 of Tower B with panoramic KL skyline views. Perfect for solo travellers or couples. Features a queen bed, modern kitchenette, and smart TV.
